title: Awesome Food
description: A mod that adds crafting new food with special effects [BETA]
body:
Now you can create quite interesting dishes, each dish has its own effect or restores hunger well. All textures are worked out and look good. So far, the mod has beta access, then it will receive updates and an expansion of the food selection

This mod will allow you to create new types of food. Various soups, chocolates, pies and much more. Almost every item in the mod has its own effects, for example, a chocolate bar that heals you or a shulker pie that will make you float above the ground for a while. At the moment, the mod is in beta, but you can already try it on yourself

![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0043e0590635a0d23b51de8e597050544e96076_0.webp)


_You can see all the recipes in the images tab in the mod description_
